economic_notes: GBEs include KFN Enterprises Limited Partnership, KFN Enterprises Ltd., and Choxw Holdings Corporation. KFN Enterprises LP reported net income of $2,049,249 in 2021. First Nation is a member of BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership. Multiple related party land development and consulting entities exist.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 (not 2024). GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis include KFN Enterprises LP, KFN Enterprises Ltd., and Choxw Holdings Corporation. One fully consolidated subsidiary: Kwikwetlem First Nation Social Housing Program. Share of income from GBEs ($2,046,279) is a major revenue driver. Long-term debt includes callable debt ($917,512) and CMHC mortgages ($558,743). total_government_transfers includes ISC ($1,354,395), Province of BC ($352,350), First Nations Health Authority ($209,938), CMHC subsidies ($36,787), FN Lands Management Resource Centre ($112,050), Government of Canada ($111,600), Fraser Health Authority ($450) = $2,177,570; however BC Gaming LP ($278,600) added brings total to $2,456,170 if gaming transfers included. OSR calculated excluding ISC, Province of BC, FNHA, CMHC subsidies, GoC, Fraser Health, FNLMRC. No schedule of remuneration provided. Prior year 2020 had large Province of BC revenue of $2,644,208 likely a one-time land/treaty-related transfer.
